properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm Still Standing After all I've been Through And I'll Wave my Flag To Show that I'm Alive I've been through so much Many Hurdles Faced I'm not going back this time Around I'm not going back this time Around

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oooh ooh oooh ooh I'll Wave my FLAG I'll Host it up for all to See That God is good He never Sleeps, He never Faints I'm not going back this time Around I'm not going back This time Around

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll Wave my FLAG My Testimony is Written All Over it And I'll Show the Scars To the World That God has been Good All the Time, Anywhere, OH.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes, I'm Still Standing After all they've Thrown at me I'm Still Dancing After all the Broken Songs The Light of my Life Saved Me The Love of my Life Has Blown a Kiss And I'm Still Standing Blown a Kiss And I'm Still Standing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm Still Standing After all I've been Through I'm Still Standing After all the many Years All the Trials and the Battles That has Broken me before

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Will never Rise a Second Time Will never Rise a Second Time Will never Take my Joy Away Will never Rise a Second Time Will never Rise a Second Time Will never Take my Joy Away

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land Goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land Goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land Goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Not going back, This time around Not going back this time around Not going back This time around (Oh oh oh) Not going back this time around Goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land Goodbye yesterday (oh oh oh oh) Goodbye pain Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Not going back This time around Not going back this time around Not going back This time around (to the old way) (Not going back) Not going back this time around

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I'm not going back this time around (Can you tell your neighbor, I'm not going say) I'm not going back this time around I'm not going back this time around Goodbye yesterday Goodbye pain, (Goodbye all the struggles) Goodbye all the struggles in that trouble land I'm not going back this time around I'm not going back this time around
